raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet raugi/ irr tas weenu
Dehlu dsem:dinajs/ kas wiſſus
Brehkug ſawa Tehwa/ ko tas
arra/ aprauga un uſluhko/ un
avatt ne darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne ehd us Kalneem/un ne
azelf ſawas Aziz us Iſraët a
Naimma Suhdu • Deeveem/ ne
mpgahna ſawas Tuwaka Seewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "An neweenu ne nospaida/
o Kihfu ne paturr/ un ne kahdu
aupijumu laupa/ ſawu Maiſi
eem Iſſalkufcheem dohd/ un to
Blikku ar Drebbehm apgehrbj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sawu Rohfu no Netaif-
tbas nogreſch/ nekahdu Augu-
nu nedß Pagaidus pleſſit/
nannas Teefas darra/ un man-
ôs Eikcumôs ſtatga/ tas pats
ata Tehwa Netaifnibas deht
e nomirs/ wiꞥſch teefchan dsih-
wohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winna Tehws/ ta-
ehz ka wiꞥſch ar Apbehdinga-
chanu irr apbehdinajs/ta Brah-
a Mantu laupis/ un darrijs
as nelabbi bija tuwo Lauschu
Widdû/raugi/ tas nomirs eekſch
wa Noseeguma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fattat juhe: Kapelz
e buhs tam Dehlam ſawa Teh-
va Noseeguma nest? teefchan/
as Dehls/ kas Teefu un Taif-
tbu irr darrijs/ wiſſus mannis
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tam Dehtam ne buhs
nest ta Tehwa Noseegunn/ nedß
tam Tehwam buhs ta Dehla
Noseeguma nest/ ta Taifniba
ta Taifna paliks pahr winnu/
un ta Besdeevisa ta Besdeewi-
ga paliks pahr winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad tas Besdeewi-
gajs atgreeschahs no wiſſeem fa-
weenâ Grehkeem/ ko tas irr dar-
rijs/ un turr wiſſus mannis Lik-
kumus/ un darra kas teefa un
taifns irr/ tad tas teefchan dsih-
wohs un ne nomirs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſas winna Pahr-
kahpſchanas/ ko wiꞥſch irr dar-
rijs/ ne taps winnam peeminne-
tas/ winna Taifnibas deht ko
wiꞥſch darra/ wiꞥſch dsihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Warretu man ta Bes-
deewiga Nahwe labbi patikt?
takka tas Klungs KUNGS:
Neggi man patihk/ kad wiꞥſch
atgreeschahs no ſawa Zelta/ un
dsihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad tas Taifnajs no-
greſchahs no ſawas Taifnibas/
un darra Netaifnibu/ darridams
wiſſas Netaifnibas/ ko tas Bes-
deewigajs darra/ bij tam dsih-
woht? wiſſa winna Taifniba/ ko
wiꞥſch irr darrijs/ ne taps pee-
mineta/ eekſch tahs Pahrkahp-
chanas/ ar ko wiꞥſch irr pahrkah-
pees/ un eekſch teem Grehkeem/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
